title: Better Spyglass
description: Improve your spyglass uses by using it from your belt while your friends watch!
body:
Better Spyglass


I have struck once again! Use your spyglass from your pocket, inventory offhand, belt slot or whatever you want! Even on forge AND fabric! But most importantly: While you are spying with your little eye, your friends can actually watch you in multiplayer. Yes, this is seriously my USP. This mod might have less configurability than other mods you might find but none of them are "immersive" in multiplayer :P

Usage

In your controls you will find a new key to trigger the spyglass. The default binding is R. Please check if there is a key conflict before using!

The mysterious belt slot

The belt slot will be enabled when using
  • Curios on Forge
  • Trinkets on Fabric
Putting the spyglass into the belt slot will also make it available for use via the key.
